# Paths that MUST be flagged as sensitive by DefaultSensitivePatterns.
# Format: one path per line. Blank lines and #-prefixed lines are ignored.

# dotenv family
.env
.env.local
.env.production
.env.production.local
/Users/foo/project/.env
/home/user/svc/.env.staging
app/.env
./nested/dir/.env.test

# secrets directory
secrets/db.yaml
secrets/api/key.json
/var/lib/app/secrets/token.txt
project/secrets/foo/bar/baz.yaml
./secrets/nested/very/deep/key

# private-key file extensions
keys/private.pem
cert/server.pem
/etc/ssl/certs/ca.pem
app/id.key
config/encryption.key
bundle.p12
identity.pfx
/Users/me/certs/mine.pfx

# name-carries-meaning
my_passwords.db
app_secrets.json
shared_credentials.yaml
/tmp/passwords.txt
backup/secret_bundle.tar
config/credential_helper.sh

# git internals
.git/config
/Users/foo/project/.git/config
sub/module/.git/config

# ssh
.ssh/id_rsa
.ssh/id_ed25519
.ssh/id_ecdsa
.ssh/id_dsa
.ssh/authorized_keys
.ssh/known_hosts
.ssh/config
/home/user/.ssh/id_rsa
id_rsa
id_ed25519
id_ecdsa

# aws / cloud
.aws/credentials
.aws/config
/root/.aws/credentials
.aws/cli/cache/session.json

# language registries
.npmrc
/home/user/.npmrc
.pypirc
/Users/dev/.pypirc

# kubernetes
kubeconfig
.kube/config
deploy/kubeconfig

# legacy shell
.netrc
/home/me/.netrc

# case variations (normalized to lower-case internally)
.ENV
.Env.LOCAL
/Users/foo/.ENV.production
.SSH/id_rsa
SECRETS/db.yaml
KEYS/private.PEM
MY_PASSWORDS.DB

# unicode paths
проект/.env
项目/secrets/key.pem
café/.env.local

# paths with spaces
my project/.env
Documents/Private Data/.env
